summary.query_summary: Query extracts 26 columns from 8 table(s) covering General, Patient Demographics, Referrals and 1 more domain(s)
query_filters_english: Appointment Sequence For Referral = 1 or Appointment Sequence For Referral is null
Date referral was created ≥ today minus 2 years
The category value corresponding to the status of each referral record is not null
Appointment date and time ≥ today minus 2 years
Count of distinct Unique referral identifier ≥ 10

technical_definition.resolved_expression: REFERRAL.REFERRAL_ID
REFERRAL.PAT_ID
PATIENT.PAT_NAME
DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR)

transformation_chain.name: age_years
transformation_chain.expression: DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR) AS age_years

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR) < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR) BETWEEN 18 AND 40 THEN 'Young Adult' WHEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR) BETWEEN 41 AND 65 THEN 'Middle Age' ELSE 'Senior' END

transformation_chain.name: age_category
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR) < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR) BETWEEN 18 AND 40 THEN 'Young Adult' WHEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR) BETWEEN 41 AND 65 THEN 'Middle Age' ELSE 'Senior' END AS age_category /* Age-based risk category */

technical_definition.resolved_expression: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROBLEM_LIST AS pl WHERE pl.PAT_ID = p.PAT_ID AND pl.RESOLVED_DATE IS NULL)

transformation_chain.name: active_problem_count
transformation_chain.expression: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROBLEM_LIST AS pl WHERE pl.PAT_ID = p.PAT_ID AND pl.RESOLVED_DATE IS NULL) AS active_problem_count /* Count of active problems (subquery) */

columns.english_definition: (Count of rows, from PROBLEM_LIST, where The date the problem was resolved in calendar format is null)

technical_definition.resolved_expression: REFERRAL.ENTRY_DATE
ZC_RFL_STATUS.NAME
ZC_SPECIALTY.NAME
CASE r.RFL_CLASS_C WHEN 1 THEN 'Internal' WHEN 2 THEN 'Incoming' WHEN 3 THEN 'Outgoing' ELSE 'Unknown' END

transformation_chain.name: referral_class
transformation_chain.expression: CASE r.RFL_CLASS_C WHEN 1 THEN 'Internal' WHEN 2 THEN 'Incoming' WHEN 3 THEN 'Outgoing' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS referral_class

columns.english_definition: Mapped from The category value indicating the class of each referral record: 1 → 'Internal'; 2 → 'Incoming'; 3 → 'Outgoing'; otherwise 'Unknown'

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (1, 2) THEN 'Active' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (4, 5) THEN 'Closed-Negative' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C = 6 THEN 'Closed-Complete' ELSE 'Pending' END

transformation_chain.name: referral_category
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (1, 2) THEN 'Active' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (4, 5) THEN 'Closed-Negative' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C = 6 THEN 'Closed-Complete' ELSE 'Pending' END AS referral_category

columns.english_definition: Categorization: when The category value corresponding to the status of each referral record in (1, 2), 'Active'; when The category value corresponding to the status of each referral record in (4, 5), 'Closed-Negative'; when The category value corresponding to the status of each referral record = 6, 'Closed-Complete'; otherwise 'Pending'

technical_definition.resolved_expression: F_SCHED_APPT.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID
F_SCHED_APPT.APPT_DTTM
CASE fa.APPT_STATUS_C WHEN 2 THEN 'Completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'Cancelled' WHEN 4 THEN 'No Show' WHEN 5 THEN 'Left Without Seen' WHEN 6 THEN 'Arrived' ELSE 'Scheduled' END

transformation_chain.name: appt_outcome
transformation_chain.expression: CASE fa.APPT_STATUS_C WHEN 2 THEN 'Completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'Cancelled' WHEN 4 THEN 'No Show' WHEN 5 THEN 'Left Without Seen' WHEN 6 THEN 'Arrived' ELSE 'Scheduled' END AS appt_outcome /* Appointment outcome classification */

columns.english_definition: Mapped from Appointment status: 2 → 'Completed'; 3 → 'Cancelled'; 4 → 'No Show'; 5 → 'Left Without Seen'; 6 → 'Arrived'; otherwise 'Scheduled'

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CLARITY_DEP.DEPARTMENT_NAME
CLARITY_SER.PROV_NAME
DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(ah.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(br.referral_date AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY)

transformation_chain.name: days_to_appointment
transformation_chain.expression: DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(ah.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(br.referral_date AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY) AS days_to_appointment /* Days from referral to appointment */

technical_definition.resolved_expression: DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(fa.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(fa.APPT_MADE_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY)

transformation_chain.name: lead_time_days
transformation_chain.expression: DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(fa.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(fa.APPT_MADE_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY) AS lead_time_days /* Days between scheduling and appointment */

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN NOT fa.CHECKIN_DTTM IS NULL AND NOT fa.CHECKOUT_DTTM IS NULL THEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(fa.CHECKOUT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(fa.CHECKIN_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), MINUTE) ELSE NULL END

transformation_chain.name: visit_duration_minutes
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN NOT fa.CHECKIN_DTTM IS NULL AND NOT fa.CHECKOUT_DTTM IS NULL THEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(fa.CHECKOUT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(fa.CHECKIN_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), MINUTE) ELSE NULL END AS visit_duration_minutes /* Wait time in minutes (check-in to checkout) */

columns.english_definition: (unparseable: CASE WHEN NOT fa.CHECKIN_DTTM IS NULL AND NOT fa.CHECKOUT_DT)

technical_definition.resolved_expression: SUM(CASE WHEN fa.APPT_STATUS_C = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY fa.PAT_ID ORDER BY fa.APPT_DTTM ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)

transformation_chain.name: cumulative_no_shows
transformation_chain.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN fa.APPT_STATUS_C = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY fa.PAT_ID ORDER BY fa.APPT_DTTM ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_no_shows /* Running count of no-shows per patient */

columns.english_definition: Sum of Categorization: when Appointment status = 4, 1; otherwise 0, for same Unique patient identifier, ordered by Appointment date and time

technical_definition.resolved_expression: AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(ah.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(br.referral_date AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY) AS FLOAT))

transformation_chain.name: specialty_avg_days
transformation_chain.expression: sm.avg_days_to_first_appt AS specialty_avg_days /* Compare to specialty average */

transformation_chain.name: days_to_appointment
transformation_chain.expression: DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(ah.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(br.referral_date AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY) AS days_to_appointment /* Days from referral to appointment */

technical_definition.resolved_expression: COALESCE(DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(ah.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(br.referral_date AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY), 0) - COALESCE(AVG(CAST(days_to_appointment AS FLOAT)), 0)

transformation_chain.name: days_to_appointment
transformation_chain.expression: DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(ah.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(br.referral_date AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY) AS days_to_appointment /* Days from referral to appointment */

transformation_chain.name: days_to_appointment
transformation_chain.expression: DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(ah.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(br.referral_date AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY) AS days_to_appointment /* Days from referral to appointment */

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL THEN REFERRAL_ID END) AS FLOAT) /* Conversion rate */ / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REFERRAL_ID), 0) * 100

transformation_chain.name: conversion_rate_pct
transformation_chain.expression: CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL THEN REFERRAL_ID END) AS FLOAT) /* Conversion rate */ / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REFERRAL_ID), 0) * 100 AS conversion_rate_pct

columns.english_definition: Count of distinct Categorization: when Unique encounter/appointment identifier (CSN) is not null, Unique referral identifier divided by null when Count of distinct Unique referral identifier = 0, otherwise Count of distinct Unique referral identifier times 100

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN appt_outcome = 'Completed' THEN REFERRAL_ID END) AS FLOAT) /* Completion rate (of those with appointments) */ / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL THEN REFERRAL_ID END), 0) * 100

transformation_chain.name: completion_rate_pct
transformation_chain.expression: CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN appt_outcome = 'Completed' THEN REFERRAL_ID END) AS FLOAT) /* Completion rate (of those with appointments) */ / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL THEN REFERRAL_ID END), 0) * 100 AS completion_rate_pct

transformation_chain.name: appt_outcome
transformation_chain.expression: CASE fa.APPT_STATUS_C WHEN 2 THEN 'Completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'Cancelled' WHEN 4 THEN 'No Show' WHEN 5 THEN 'Left Without Seen' WHEN 6 THEN 'Arrived' ELSE 'Scheduled' END AS appt_outcome /* Appointment outcome classification */

columns.english_definition: Count of distinct Categorization: when Appointment Outcome = 'Completed', Unique referral identifier divided by null when Count of distinct Categorization: when Unique encounter/appointment identifier (CSN) is not null, Unique referral identifier = 0, otherwise Count of distinct Categorization: when Unique encounter/appointment identifier (CSN) is not null, Unique referral identifier times 100

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN ra.cumulative_no_shows >= 3 THEN 'High Risk - Multiple No Shows' WHEN ra.cumulative_no_shows >= 1 AND ra.age_category = 'Senior' THEN 'Medium Risk - Senior with No Show History' WHEN ra.active_problem_count >= 5 THEN 'Medium Risk - Complex Patient' WHEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(ah.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(br.referral_date AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY) > AVG(CAST(days_to_appointment AS FLOAT)) * 2 THEN 'Medium Risk - Long Wait Time' ELSE 'Standard' END

transformation_chain.name: patient_risk_flag
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN ra.cumulative_no_shows >= 3 THEN 'High Risk - Multiple No Shows' WHEN ra.cumulative_no_shows >= 1 AND ra.age_category = 'Senior' THEN 'Medium Risk - Senior with No Show History' WHEN ra.active_problem_count >= 5 THEN 'Medium Risk - Complex Patient' WHEN ra.days_to_appointment > sm.avg_days_to_first_appt * 2 THEN 'Medium Risk - Long Wait Time' ELSE 'Standard' END AS patient_risk_flag /* Risk flags */

transformation_chain.name: cumulative_no_shows
transformation_chain.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN fa.APPT_STATUS_C = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY fa.PAT_ID ORDER BY fa.APPT_DTTM ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_no_shows /* Running count of no-shows per patient */

transformation_chain.name: active_problem_count
transformation_chain.expression: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROBLEM_LIST AS pl WHERE pl.PAT_ID = p.PAT_ID AND pl.RESOLVED_DATE IS NULL) AS active_problem_count /* Count of active problems (subquery) */

transformation_chain.name: days_to_appointment
transformation_chain.expression: DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(ah.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(br.referral_date AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY) AS days_to_appointment /* Days from referral to appointment */

transformation_chain.name: cumulative_no_shows
transformation_chain.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN fa.APPT_STATUS_C = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY fa.PAT_ID ORDER BY fa.APPT_DTTM ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_no_shows /* Running count of no-shows per patient */

transformation_chain.name: age_category
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR) < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR) BETWEEN 18 AND 40 THEN 'Young Adult' WHEN DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(p.BIRTH_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)), YEAR) BETWEEN 41 AND 65 THEN 'Middle Age' ELSE 'Senior' END AS age_category /* Age-based risk category */

transformation_chain.name: days_to_appointment
transformation_chain.expression: DATEDIFF(TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(ah.APPT_DTTM AS TIMESTAMP)), TIME_STR_TO_TIME(CAST(br.referral_date AS TIMESTAMP)), DAY) AS days_to_appointment /* Days from referral to appointment */

columns.english_definition: (unparseable: CASE WHEN ra.cumulative_no_shows >= 3 THEN 'High Risk - Mult)

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN ra.appt_outcome = 'Completed' THEN 1 WHEN ra.appt_outcome IN ('Cancelled', 'No Show') THEN 0 WHEN ra.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL AND ra.referral_category = 'Active' THEN NULL /* Still pending */ ELSE 0 END

transformation_chain.name: referral_success_flag
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN ra.appt_outcome = 'Completed' THEN 1 WHEN ra.appt_outcome IN ('Cancelled', 'No Show') THEN 0 WHEN ra.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL AND ra.referral_category = 'Active' THEN NULL /* Still pending */ ELSE 0 END AS referral_success_flag /* Referral success indicator */

transformation_chain.name: appt_outcome
transformation_chain.expression: CASE fa.APPT_STATUS_C WHEN 2 THEN 'Completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'Cancelled' WHEN 4 THEN 'No Show' WHEN 5 THEN 'Left Without Seen' WHEN 6 THEN 'Arrived' ELSE 'Scheduled' END AS appt_outcome /* Appointment outcome classification */

transformation_chain.name: appt_outcome
transformation_chain.expression: CASE fa.APPT_STATUS_C WHEN 2 THEN 'Completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'Cancelled' WHEN 4 THEN 'No Show' WHEN 5 THEN 'Left Without Seen' WHEN 6 THEN 'Arrived' ELSE 'Scheduled' END AS appt_outcome /* Appointment outcome classification */

transformation_chain.name: referral_category
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (1, 2) THEN 'Active' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (4, 5) THEN 'Closed-Negative' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C = 6 THEN 'Closed-Complete' ELSE 'Pending' END AS referral_category

columns.english_definition: Categorization: when Appointment Outcome = 'Completed', 1; when Appointment Outcome in ('Cancelled', 'No Show'), 0; when Unique encounter/appointment identifier (CSN) is null and Referral Category = 'Active', null; otherwise 0
